domain: Pakistani Qawwali (Sufi devotional music tradition): mahfil-e-sama exclusive Sufi gatherings; lead vocalist + harmonium + tabla + chorus; audience-listener experiences 5-stage continuum (kaif mild enthusiasm -> kaifiyat engagement -> hal trance -> wajd ecstasy -> fana annihilation); word-repetition-with-variation gradually induces trance hal; adab comportment rules; trance markers (kanpna trembling, eye-closure, head-movement, breath-pattern); audience hal-emergence signals output quality
specific_mechanism: QAWWALI-SAMA-TRANCE-CONTINUUM-EVAL: 5-stage emotional-arousal evaluation pipeline with audience-trance proxy + word-repetition-variation reward + adab constraint + kanpna trembling marker. (1) 5-stage hal continuum = ordinal labels {kaif, kaifiyat, hal, wajd, fana} for output engagement-quality (5-class instead of binary). (2) Listener-LLM trance proxy: per-candidate-output, an LLM-as-listener instance outputs hal-continuum score s_h in {0,...,4}; this proxies emotional-arousal-trace evaluation. (3) Word-repetition-with-variation reward: training reward boosts outputs demonstrating bigram repetition + controlled morphological variation (induces audience hal trance through hypnotic structure). (4) Adab comportment constraint: outputs penalized for adab-violation (obscenity, abrupt topic shift, flat affect, disrespect) — penalty constraint set enforced via classifier. (5) Kanpna trembling marker: token-level attention-weight high-variance moments are detected as proxy for output evoking trance (analog of physical trembling). (6) Lead-vocalist + chorus dual evaluator: 2-channel evaluation = high-capacity lead-LLM nuanced judge + K-LLM chorus consensus reliability judge; combined via lead-weight + chorus-confidence. (7) Differs from R481 KHOOMEI-PARTIAL-JUDGE (harmonic-partial multi-criteria, no continuum + no kanpna) and R494 NECHUNG-3-TIER-EVAL (trance-medium-council, no 5-stage ordinal + no word-repetition reward) and R506 KANUN-BESA-PRECEDENT-TRIBUNAL by 5-stage hal continuum ordinal + word-repetition-variation reward + adab comportment constraint + kanpna trembling attention-variance marker + lead+chorus dual evaluator.
llm_application: QAWWALI-SAMA-TRANCE-CONTINUUM-EVAL 5-stage hal continuum ordinal eval (kaif-kaifiyat-hal-wajd-fana) + listener-LLM trance proxy s_h score + word-repetition-with-variation training reward + adab comportment penalty constraint + kanpna attention-variance trembling marker + lead+chorus dual-channel evaluator. Differs from R359 ETRUSCAN. R430 KINTSUGI. R445 IFA. R456 JHATOR. R466 ROMANI-KRIS. R481 KHOOMEI-PARTIAL-JUDGE (closest — harmonic-partial multi-criteria, no 5-stage ordinal + no kanpna). R494 NECHUNG-3-TIER-EVAL (closest — trance-medium 3-tier, no 5-stage ordinal + no word-repetition reward + no adab constraint). R506 KANUN-BESA-PRECEDENT-TRIBUNAL. Differs from LLMs-as-Judges Survey 2412.05579 + Multi-Turn Dialogue Evaluator 2508.00454 + Eliciting Emotions CHI 2025 + GUIDELLM NAACL 2025 by 5-stage hal continuum + word-repetition reward + adab constraint + kanpna trembling. Differs by 5-STAGE HAL CONTINUUM + WORD-REPETITION-VARIATION REWARD + ADAB CONSTRAINT + KANPNA TREMBLING MARKER.
novelty_claim: LLMs-as-Judges + Multi-Turn Dialogue Evaluator + Eliciting Emotions + GUIDELLM literature cover LLM-judge + multi-turn + emotional-arousal evaluation space. QAWWALI-SAMA-TRANCE-CONTINUUM-EVAL adds (a) 5-stage hal continuum ordinal + (b) word-repetition-variation training reward + (c) adab comportment constraint + (d) kanpna trembling attention-variance marker + (e) lead+chorus dual evaluator. Recombination — borderline lookup.
